repos.description: Comprehensive Claude Code plugin marketplace by Seth Hobson with 112 specialized AI agents, 146 skills, 79 dev tools, and 16 workflow orchestrators across 73 focused plugins covering full-stack development, security, infrastructure, AI/ML, and more.

Official Anthropic-managed directory of high-quality Claude Code plugins including feature-dev, frontend-design, plugin-dev toolkit, claude-md-management, claude-code-setup, and an example plugin reference implementation.

Anthropic's open-source plugins for knowledge workers using Claude Cowork (also compatible with Claude Code). Includes 11 role-based plugins for sales, legal, customer support, data, marketing, product management, productivity, and bioinformatics.

Every Inc's compound engineering plugin for Claude Code with 29+ agents, 23 workflow commands, and 18 skills. Implements a methodology where each unit of engineering work compounds to make future work easier, with planning, review, and knowledge-capture workflows. Includes a CLI to convert plugins to 10+ other agent platforms.

Ghost Security's application security skills for Claude Code. Provides AI-native AppSec scanning including SAST code analysis, dependency vulnerability exploitability analysis (SCA), secrets detection, and dynamic vulnerability testing via companion tools (reaper, poltergeist, wraith).

An agentic skills framework and software development methodology by Jesse Vincent. Provides a structured workflow (brainstorming → design → planning → subagent-driven development) with enforced TDD, git worktree isolation, and systematic debugging. Works across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode.

Trail of Bits Claude Code plugin marketplace for security research, vulnerability detection, and audit workflows. Includes skills for secure smart contract development, constant-time analysis, audit context building, differential review, testing handbook generation, and more.

Curated, community-vetted Claude Code plugin marketplace maintained by Trail of Bits. Aggregates and reviews third-party skills and approved external marketplaces, including auto-converted OpenAI Codex skills. Every addition gets code review before inclusion.

Marketing skills for AI coding agents by Corey Haines covering CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, growth engineering, email sequences, A/B testing, ad creative, AI search optimization, churn prevention, and more. Includes 51 CLI tools and works across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Windsurf.

OpenAI's official skills catalog for Codex. Contains system skills (skill-creator, skill-installer), curated skills (openai-docs), and experimental skills (create-plan). Skills package repeatable capabilities for specific tasks and are installable via the built-in skill-installer.
